Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing on Cross Complaint. Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; CSR: M. Baldocchi #5207.

Joshua Ridless, Esq. for Corss-Plaintiff: J K Sound, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Steve Hixon was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default has been entered against the Cross-Defendant(s): Harjit SIm, Steve Sim and Inexpro. (see consolidated case #496108)

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Corss-Plaintiff: J K Sound, Inc., and against the Defaulted Cross-Defendant(s): Harjit SIm, Steve Sim and Inexpro for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $11,929.69
Prejudgment Interest - $6,058.47
Attorney's Fees - $5,237.57
Costs - $1,468.66
Total judgment in the amount of $24,694.39
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
